Document:
# Criminal Code
The Criminal Code outlines offenses and punishments under the Uniform Code of Military Justice. Below you will find a list of crimes divided by severity.
## Categories - [textlink="Optional Crimes" link="AU14UCMJOptionalCrimes"] - [textlink="Minor Crimes" link="AU14UCMJMinorCrimes"] - [textlink="Major Crimes" link="AU14UCMJMajorCrimes"] - [textlink="Capital Crimes" link="AU14UCMJCapitalCrimes"] - [textlink="Precautionary Charges" link="AU14UCMJPrecautionaryCharges"]
